title: syringa × hyacinthiflora
intro: Syringa × hyacinthiflora, also known as the Philadelphus or Mock Orange, is a type of flowering plant in the Hydrangea family, characterized by its fragrant and showy white flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Syringa × hyacinthiflora include reducing stress and anxiety, promoting relaxation and improving sleep quality, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Syringa × hyacinthiflora include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties for various health benefits.
